summary: Tested iteration 136: Earning Actions with Retroactive Point Awards. All 7 backend tests pass (100%). UI verified - Earning Actions section shows 6/8 completed with progress bar, unclaimed actions (Qualified Referral, Deposit Bonus) at top, completed actions below with green Done badges, and x3 multiplier badge for repeatable 5-Day Trade Streak action.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Master admin has: 415 points, Trade Novice level, Rank #1. Earning actions: 6/8 completed (signup_verify, join_community, first_trade, first_daily_win, streak_5_day x3, milestone_10_trade). Unclaimed: qualified_referral (0 referrals), deposit (0 deposits). 7 badges earned.

get_earning_actions_api.details: GET /api/rewards/earning-actions returns 8 actions with id, name, description, points, awarded, claimable, one_time, category, and times_awarded for repeatable actions

claim_join_community_double_prevention.details: POST /api/rewards/claim/join_community returns 400 'You have already claimed this action' when already awarded

claim_first_trade_not_claimable.details: POST /api/rewards/claim/first_trade returns 400 'This action cannot be manually claimed' - only join_community is manually claimable

retroactive_scan_api.details: POST /api/rewards/retroactive-scan returns user_id, stats (lifetime_trades, best_streak_days, etc), newly_awarded badges, and awarded_actions list

earning_actions_ui_section.details: My Rewards page shows Earning Actions section with progress bar (6/8 completed), unclaimed actions at top (Qualified Referral, Deposit Bonus), completed section below with Done badges

progress_bar_ui.details: Progress bar shows gradient fill proportional to 6/8 = 75% completion

times_awarded_badge.details: 5-Day Trade Streak shows 'x3' badge indicating it was awarded 3 times (repeatable action)

done_badge_display.details: Green checkmark with 'Done' text displayed for completed one-time actions

api_tests_run: GET /api/rewards/earning-actions - 8 actions returned with correct status
ui_elements_verified: data-testid='earning-action-{id}' - Individual action cards for all 8 actions
